mapper.select: select product_id, product_material, product_emissions, product_desc, product_img from carbon_definition_tbl ORDER BY 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARBON_DEFINITION_TBL ( PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_MATERIAL, PRODUCT_EMISSIONS, PRODUCT_IMG, PRODUCT_DESC ) VALUES ( PRODUCT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{product.productMaterial}, #{product.productEmissions}, #{product.productImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product.productDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
